falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a potential trend reversal or market top.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5500 (a level not reached in the bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this threshold would invalidate the pattern similarity, showing divergent behavior from the historical 'bottom' pattern and refuting the current 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume in the S&P 500 surges to 20% above the 200-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would indicate extreme market participation, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a strong trend continuation rather than a consolidation phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
